summary: NT Commerce 12.0 Iteration 73 - REGRESSION TEST after splitting legacy_inline_routes.py into 8 focused route files and applying permission system with require_permission() to 11 route files (73 endpoints). Backend: 35/35 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login and Dashboard working correctly with Arabic RTL layout. Both previously failing endpoints (SIM slots, invoice templates) now pass - ObjectId serialization fix verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Permission system implemented correctly with require_permission() factory in utils/permissions.py
Admin roles (admin, tenant_admin, super_admin, manager, owner) correctly bypass permission checks
11 route files now use permission-protected endpoints via Depends(require_permission())

8 new route files extracted from legacy_inline_routes.py: auth_users_routes, utility_routes, notifications_routes, ocr_invoice_routes, recharge_sim_routes, shipping_loyalty_routes, families_permissions_routes, system_sync_routes
server.py is 6 lines (thin wrapper: 'from main import app')

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard load correctly with RTL Arabic layout)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 completed full regression test. Permission system working - 73 endpoints now protected. Previously failing endpoints (invoice templates, SIM slots) now pass. All routes extracted from legacy_inline_routes.py verified working.

frontend_pages.Login page: PASS - Arabic RTL layout, form fields work
frontend_pages.Dashboard: PASS - Shows stats (5 products, 5 customers, 1 supplier, 1 low stock)
